ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario being simulated */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "num_pedestrians" INTEGER /* Number of pedestrians in the simulation */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the simulation */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the simulation represents */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day the simulation represents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment being simulated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the scenario */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the scenario */,
  "estimated_pedestrian_flow" INTEGER /* Estimated number of pedestrians expected in the scenario */,
  "traffic_light_config" TEXT /* Configuration of traffic lights in the scenario */,
  "public_event" TEXT /* Type of public event during the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the environment in meters */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the environment in meters */,
  "3d_model" TEXT /* Path to the 3D model file of the environment */,
  "terrain_type" TEXT /* Type of terrain */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the environment */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pedestrians" (
  "pedestrian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pedestrian */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the pedestrian is part of */,
  "start_x" REAL /* Starting x-coordinate of the pedestrian */,
  "start_y" REAL /* Starting y-coordinate of the pedestrian */,
  "target_x" REAL /* Target x-coordinate of the pedestrian */,
  "target_y" REAL /* Target y-coordinate of the pedestrian */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the pedestrian */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the pedestrian */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the pedestrian */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the pedestrian */,
  "walking_speed" REAL /* Average walking speed of the pedestrian */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the pedestrian is part of */,
  "pedestrian_type" TEXT /* Type of pedestrian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pedestrian_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pedestrians_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_steps" (
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time step */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the time step is part of */,
  "time" REAL /* Time of the time step in seconds */,
  "frame_rate" INTEGER /* Frame rate of the simulation */,
  "time_step_duration" REAL /* Duration of each time step in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_steps_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pedestrian_positions" (
  "pedestrian_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pedestrian */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step */,
  "x" REAL /* x-coordinate of the pedestrian at the time step */,
  "y" REAL /* y-coordinate of the pedestrian at the time step */,
  "z" REAL /* z-coordinate of the pedestrian at the time step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pedestrian_id", "time_step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pedestrian_velocities" (
  "pedestrian_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pedestrian */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step */,
  "vx" REAL /* x-component of the pedestrian's velocity at the time step */,
  "vy" REAL /* y-component of the pedestrian's velocity at the time step */,
  "vz" REAL /* z-component of the pedestrian's velocity at the time step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pedestrian_id", "time_step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pedestrian_accelerations" (
  "pedestrian_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pedestrian */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step */,
  "ax" REAL /* x-component of the pedestrian's acceleration at the time step */,
  "ay" REAL /* y-component of the pedestrian's acceleration at the time step */,
  "az" REAL /* z-component of the pedestrian's acceleration at the time step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pedestrian_id", "time_step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "obstacles" (
  "obstacle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each obstacle */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment the obstacle is in */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of obstacle (e.g. building, wall, etc.) */,
  "x" REAL /* x-coordinate of the obstacle */,
  "y" REAL /* y-coordinate of the obstacle */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the obstacle */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the obstacle */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the obstacle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the obstacle */,
  "is_dynamic" INTEGER /* Whether the obstacle can move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obstacle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obstacles_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pedestrian_obstacle_interactions" (
  "pedestrian_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pedestrian */,
  "obstacle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the obstacle */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the pedestrian and the obstacle at the time step */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pedestrian_id", "obstacle_id", "time_step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pedestrian_pedestrian_interactions" (
  "pedestrian1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first pedestrian */,
  "pedestrian2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second pedestrian */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the two pedestrians at the time step */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the interaction is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pedestrian1_id", "pedestrian2_id", "time_step_id")
)
